subtitle.workforce: Manage and operate your digital workforce.

login.title: Sign in

advanced.queued: Export job queued ({jobId}…). Download link when ready.
advanced.retentionDescription: Session transcripts and third-party chat data follow these policies.

advanced.deleteOrgDescription: Permanently delete all organization data. Requires two-factor authentication when enabled.
advanced.deleteOrgDialogDescription: This permanently deletes "{name}" and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

personalData.title: My personal data
personalData.description: Export or delete your account data (152-FZ subject rights, Art. 14)
personalData.deleteAccountDescription: This permanently deletes your profile, sessions, and consent records. Type DELETE to confirm.

billing.designPartnersDesc: Closed early-deployment program for companies building a digital workforce with NULLXES.
billing.designPartnersBody: Members get early access to platform capabilities, product influence, NULLXES architect support, and deployment priority.
billing.currentPlanDesc: Digital workforce plan for this organization
billing.selfServeDesc: For individual work, teams, and corporate growth.
billing.enterpriseLadderDesc: From a pilot project to a digital corporation.
billing.customerPortalDesc: Manage invoices, payments, and organization payment details.
billing.paymentTestBody: Does not change the plan. Test cards only.

free.name: Free
free.description: Talk with NULLXES catalog employees. Build your own on paid plans.
free.features: NULLXES catalog: Adeline + Yuki|30 Talk minutes / month|AI chat|No custom employees

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: NULLXES catalog plus your first custom digital employees.
starter.features: NULLXES catalog: Adeline + Yuki|2 custom digital employees|Up to 60 Talk minutes / month|Up to 10 knowledge sources|1 personal avatar|Dialog history

studio.name: Studio
studio.description: Starter catalog access with room for a personal digital team.
studio.features: NULLXES starter catalog|5 custom digital employees|Up to 180 Talk minutes / month|Expanded knowledge base|Unrestricted personal avatar|History and dialog search

operator.name: Team
operator.description: A digital team with extended catalog and first integrations.
operator.features: Extended NULLXES catalog|10 custom digital employees|Up to 600 Talk minutes / month|Shared workspace|Shared knowledge base|Read API

scale.name: Scale
scale.description: Full catalog access for companies growing a digital workforce.
scale.features: Full NULLXES catalog|20+ custom digital employees|Up to 2 000 Talk minutes / month|Full API|Multiple avatars and roles|Priority support

discovery.name: Discovery
discovery.description: Processes, architecture, and a digital employee deployment plan.
discovery.features: Business process analysis|Automation map|1–2 working prototypes|NULLXES deployment architect

pilot.name: Pilot
pilot.description: First digital employees in the company’s operating environment.
pilot.features: 3–10 digital employees|Custom avatars and voices|Corporate systems integration|Metrics and reporting

department.name: Digital department
department.description: A business unit run by digital employees under unified control.
department.features: Unit automation|Role and access control|Analytics and activity log|SSO and priority support

holding.name: Digital holding
holding.description: Manage digital employees across multiple organizations.
holding.features: Multiple organizations|Hundreds of digital employees|Data security requirements|Dedicated engineering team and SLA

flagship.name: Digital corporation
flagship.features: Private digital corporation|Private infrastructure|Custom AI models and services|Dedicated NULLXES team
